title: SSE buffer: 3 linear scans per chunk from offset 0
description:
client.rs subscribe_events loop: after each chunk is appended, three buf.find() calls (

, 

, ) each scan from byte 0. Should scan only the newly-appended suffix (last chunk_len + 3 bytes) to avoid rescanning already-checked bytes. Current complexity: O(3 * buf_len) per chunk. With suffix scan: O(chunk_len) per chunk. Degrades to O(n^2) in chunk count if a large frame arrives in many small network chunks (adversarial server or very slow link near the 1 MiB cap).
